excerpt: The last person of the ninth intellect reminded him of his sin... he made the last person of the ninth realm of the intellect a medium and offered his repentance to Him.
source_work: Rahat al-ʿAql (or al-Masabih fi Ithbat al-Imama)
source_authority: high confidence – Ismaili doctrine of intercession through the hierarchy of intellects
source_location_hint: On the Second Emanator's repentance and mediation through lower intellects

excerpt: He brought the remorse of the second source to the upper circles, until his repentance reached the circle of the first source (the people in his context). From the ninth intellect to the 27 people in the context of the first intellect, all interceded for the second intellect.
source_work: al-Masabih fi Ithbat al-Imama or Rahat al-ʿAql
source_authority: high confidence – core doctrine of intercession and hierarchical mediation
source_location_hint: On the chain of intercession for the Second Emanator's repentance

excerpt: Through the intercession of all of them, the second intellect accepted the repentance of the second and forgave him. With forgiveness, the second intellect poured upon him the rays of perfection with His mercy through all the intellects.
source_work: al-Aqwal al-Dhahabiyya or al-Masabih fi Ithbat al-Imama
source_authority: high confidence – doctrine of divine forgiveness and perfection
source_location_hint: On the acceptance of repentance and bestowal of perfection

excerpt: There are seven letters that signify the seven intellects and their realms. The second source received substance through the intercession of the seven intellects.
source_authority: high confidence – Ismaili esoteric exegesis (taʾwīl) on the kalima
source_location_hint: On the seven intellects as letters of the divine Word

excerpt: Of all these, he was the most fierce in his stubbornness and denial, and he was the furthest away from Asher... it was his creation and he established his calling in the spiritual world.
source_authority: high confidence – doctrine of Iblis Rohani (Spiritual Satan) and counter-summons
source_location_hint: On the Spiritual Satan's obstinacy and separate summons

excerpt: Asher just tried to remove their spiritual ailments and bring them from darkness to light and from sickness to health... it was necessary to convert the light into physicality.
source_authority: high confidence – Ismaili cosmology of spiritual and physical creation
source_location_hint: On the creation of the physical world as remedy for spiritual ailments

excerpt: When Asher carried out the process of destroying the Heavenly and the Form, he was fully aware of how much this disobedient group would be cleansed... He knew all this knowledge from the beginning.
source_authority: high confidence – doctrine of divine omniscience and the All-Knowing
source_location_hint: On Asher's perfect knowledge of the system of reform and resurrection

excerpt: He divided a body into different parts and made each part independent so that all could develop according to their ability and strength, and the part that was left behind would not stand in the way of the moving part.
source_authority: high confidence – Ismaili doctrine of grades and stages in the daʿwa system
source_location_hint: On the hierarchical organization of the summons and spiritual development

excerpt: Fazil, the man of this body, died as soon as he was born in the manner of Asher, becoming the third Asher... the last person in the Asher circle is called Asher.
source_work: Kitab al-ʿAlim wa-l-Ghulam or Asrar al-Nutaqaʾ
source_authority: medium-high confidence – doctrine of successive Ashers and cycles
source_location_hint: On the succession of Ashers across cycles and the role of the excellent person (person fasil)

excerpt: The third intellect joins the first intellect with its entire congregation. In the spiritual world, only the first intellect and the first source will not change their place. This system of development will continue in this way, until one day all the intellects will join their congregations in the first source.
source_authority: high confidence – doctrine of the ultimate return to the First Intellect and divine unity
source_location_hint: On the final reunion of all intellects and souls with the divine source

excerpt: Now Asher really refers to the one who is the leader of the world of life and the one who is going to stay in this world of nature. It has the same place in the world of physics as that of the first intellect in the world of origin.
source_authority: high confidence – Ismaili doctrine of the Spiritual Adam and the Imam's role in the physical world
source_location_hint: On Asher's continuing authority in the physical world through the Imam
